Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Judgment Entered

Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Continued To Mar-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:20 a.m.: APPEARANCES FOR WED., DEC-12-2012: MS. YIXUE MEI APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HER OWN BEHALF; MR. QI LIANG APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HIS OWN BEHALF THIS DAY. COURT MANDARIN LANGUAGE INTERPRETER BANNY CHOW ASSISTS MR. QI LIANG AND IS ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE CLERK.

THE COURT ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND RECEIVES AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE ALSO PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID PORTER; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).
